untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of trading range extremes, pullback analysis relative to breakout distance, and measurement of retracement percentage—none of which can be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. Requires multi-bar pattern recognition and historical range identification logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot points as a proxy for support/resistance and body_pct as a proxy for pullback retracement tolerance (38.2% Fibonacci). However, the core signal logic—identifying trading ranges, detecting first pullbacks after breakouts, and measuring retracement relative to breakout magnitude—requires pattern detection and state tracking that exceeds the scope of atomic indicator conditions.
